---
title: "BERT_PCA"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-13"
---

```{r}

library(tidyverse)
library(caret)
library(reticulate)

set.seed(42)



```

Step 1 : Load CSV Files

```{r}
# ── Step 1: Load Pete's CSV ──────────────────────────────────────────
df <- read_csv("drug_reviews_phase2.csv") %>%
  mutate(row_id = row_number())  # lock row order before anything else

head(df)

```

```{r}
# Check dimensions
cat("Rows:", nrow(df), "\n")
cat("Columns:", ncol(df), "\n")

# Check row_id is correctly assigned
cat("First row_id:", df$row_id[1], "\n")
cat("Last row_id:", df$row_id[nrow(df)], "\n")
# Should be 1 and 215063

# Check no missing row_ids
cat("Missing row_ids:", sum(is.na(df$row_id)), "\n")
# Should be 0
```


Step 2 : Generate shared train/test split

```{r}
# ── Step 2: Generate shared train/test split ─────────────────────────
# Stratified on condition_category so all 14 groups appear in both sets
train_idx <- createDataPartition(
  df$condition_category, 
  p    = 0.8, 
  list = FALSE
)

# Save as a single column CSV — everyone loads this, nobody regenerates
write_csv(
  data.frame(row_id = df$row_id[train_idx]), 
  "shared_train_idx.csv"
)
# OUTPUT 1 ✓ → shared_train_idx.csv



```

```{r}
# Check split sizes
cat("Train size:", length(train_idx), "\n")
cat("Test size:", nrow(df) - length(train_idx), "\n")
cat("Train ratio:", round(length(train_idx) / nrow(df), 2), "\n")
# Should be ~0.80

# Check all 16 condition categories appear in both sets
train_conditions <- df$condition_category[train_idx]
test_conditions  <- df$condition_category[-train_idx]

cat("Categories in train:", n_distinct(train_conditions), "\n")
cat("Categories in test:", n_distinct(test_conditions), "\n")
# Both should be 16

# Check shared_train_idx.csv was saved correctly
idx_check <- read_csv("shared_train_idx.csv")
cat("Saved train idx rows:", nrow(idx_check), "\n")
# Should match length(train_idx)
```


Step 3 : Load BERT embeddings and reduce with PCA

```{r}
np <- import("numpy")
embeddings_raw <- np$load("bert_embeddings.npy")  # 215063 × 768

# Fit PCA on training rows only — never fit on full data
emb_train <- embeddings_raw[train_idx, ]
pca_model  <- prcomp(emb_train, rank. = 50, scale. = FALSE)

# Save PCA model object — everyone loads this, nobody refits
saveRDS(pca_model, "pca_model.rds")
# OUTPUT 2 ✓ → pca_model.rds


```


```{r}
# Check embeddings loaded correctly
cat("Embeddings shape:", dim(embeddings_raw), "\n")
# Should be (215063, 768)

# Check PCA was fitted on train only
cat("PCA fitted on rows:", nrow(emb_train), "\n")
# Should match length(train_idx)

cat("PCA components:", ncol(pca_model$rotation), "\n")
# Should be 50

# Check how much variance is explained by 50 components
variance_explained <- cumsum(pca_model$sdev^2) / sum(pca_model$sdev^2)
cat("Variance explained by 50 PCs:", round(variance_explained[50] * 100, 2), "%\n")
# Ideally above 80% — if too low, consider increasing rank to 100

# Check PCA model saved
cat("PCA model file exists:", file.exists("pca_model.rds"), "\n")

```


Step 4 : Apply PCA to ALL rows (train + test)

```{r}
emb_all_reduced <- predict(pca_model, embeddings_raw)  # 215063 × 50

# Combine with row_id so Evonne and you can join safely
emb_pca_df <- as.data.frame(emb_all_reduced) %>%
  setNames(paste0("pc_", 1:50)) %>%
  mutate(row_id = df$row_id)

write_csv(emb_pca_df, "bert_pca_50.csv")
# OUTPUT 3 ✓ → bert_pca_50.csv

```


```{r}
# Check reduced dimensions
cat("Reduced embeddings shape:", dim(emb_all_reduced), "\n")
# Should be (215063, 50)

# Check column names
cat("First 5 column names:", paste(names(emb_pca_df)[1:5], collapse = ", "), "\n")
# Should be pc_1, pc_2, pc_3, pc_4, pc_5

# Check row_id matches original df
cat("row_id matches:", all(emb_pca_df$row_id == df$row_id), "\n")
# Should be TRUE

# Check no missing values
cat("Missing values in PCA df:", sum(is.na(emb_pca_df)), "\n")
# Should be 0

# Check bert_pca_50.csv saved correctly
pca_check <- read_csv("bert_pca_50.csv")
cat("Saved PCA rows:", nrow(pca_check), "\n")
cat("Saved PCA cols:", ncol(pca_check), "\n")
# Should be 215063 rows and 51 columns (50 PCs + row_id)
```


Final Check

```{r}

cat("shared_train_idx.csv exists:", file.exists("shared_train_idx.csv"), "\n")
cat("pca_model.rds exists:", file.exists("pca_model.rds"), "\n")
cat("bert_pca_50.csv exists:", file.exists("bert_pca_50.csv"), "\n")
# All should be TRUE

```
